description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal

description: The agent that grows with you
readme_excerpt: The self-improving AI agent built by Nous Research.** It's the only agent with a built-in learning loop — it creates skills from experience, improves them during use, nudges itself to persist knowledge, searches its own past conversations, and builds a deepening model of who you are across sessions.
readme_summary: The self-improving AI agent built by Nous Research.** It's the only agent with a built-in learning loop — it creates skills from experience, improves them during use, nudges itself to persist knowledge, searches its own past conversations, and builds a deepening model of who you are across sessions.
